visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women, one in a purple top and one in a hat and black top, stand in an outdoor parking lot in front of a large grey industrial building with a Costco logo. They are talking excitedly to the camera. (2) The scene shifts to inside a retail store aisle where the women hold a large pink and white box for a Philips Wet & Dry Epilator, pointing to promotional text overlays. (3) They transition to a well-lit indoor living room setting, sitting at a table with the product and several white plastic attachments laid out. They hold the device and gesture toward its features. (4) Close-up shots show the epilator head spinning, various nozzle attachments being held up to the camera, and text explaining the 3cm wide head. (5) Demonstrations occur: the device is used on a chin, a finger, and a leg. A male character's sideburn is briefly shown being trimmed by the device. (6) In a white-tiled bathroom, the woman with the hat uses the device on her leg while showering, demonstrating the waterproof functionality and the exfoliation brush attachment. (7) Comparison shots show two legs side-by-side with labels indicating 'Hair Removed' vs 'No Hair Removed,' highlighting the whitening effect. (8) The women return to the indoor studio setting, holding the device and giving a thumbs up to conclude the review.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 夏天快到了 姐妹們. (2) [Variety]: 不要錯過. (3) [Slogan]: 好市多獨家販售. [Slogan]: 飛利浦 乾濕兩用美體刀. (4) [Variety]: 限時特價 -800元. [Slogan]: 「4/28~5/11」原價2999 現在只要 2199元. (5) [Variety]: 將近七折的優惠. [Variety]: 全... (6) [Variety]: 省錢又環保! [Subtitle]: 飛利浦 乾濕兩用美體刀裡面有八個配件. (7) [Subtitle]: 3公分的除毛寬刀頭讓你一次拔除更多毛髮. [Slogan]: 省時又輕鬆. (8) [Slogan]: 蓋上保護蓋 就能去除臉部汗毛 手指腳趾等細節部位. (9) [Slogan]: 穿上泳衣前 使用比基尼修剪刀. (10) [Slogan]: 除了敏感私密的部位. [Slogan]: 男生的鬢角及後頸也可以使用喔. (11) [Slogan]: 緊張的新手們 則可以從最溫和的 無痛的刮刀頭及修剪梳使用. (12) [Slogan]: 任何部位皆適用 他能溫柔服貼 去除所有細小毛髮. [Variety]: 完全不會痛. (13) [Subtitle]: 最貼心的是它還有附去角質刷頭. [Subtitle]: 在洗澡時畫圓的方式 讓皮膚更加潔淨. (14) [Variety]: 唷!很柔軟欸. [Subtitle]: 因為可以乾濕兩用 所以洗澡時順便處理 真的很方便. (15) [Variety]: 真的很方便. [Subtitle]: 清潔機器上 也不用擔心生鏽的問題 更不擔心劃傷你的寶貴肌膚. (16) [Variety]: 安全又安心. [Slogan]: 3秒後毛髮警告! [Subtitle]: 這款除了寬刀頭 夾輪長度也夠長 可以更確實地拔除每根毛髮. (17) [Variety]: 毛髮連根拔起. [Subtitle]: 這樣子就會更加乾淨 腋下就不會像小鬍子的渣渣. (18) [Variety]: 有除毛 沒除毛. [Subtitle]: 這邊是除過毛 這邊沒除毛 顏色差一階 腿部也明顯更白. (19) [Slogan]: 除毛效果可維持2-4週. [Subtitle]: 刀頭材質是陶瓷 更加舒適不易敏感. (20) [Slogan]: 不易造成皮膚損傷及過敏. [Subtitle]: 發生毛囊炎可就得不償失了. (21) [Slogan]: 因此我們推薦這台 每個人都能輕鬆駕馭拔除毛髮. [Slogan]: 男生也可以用喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female hosts throughout; 1 male face/neck shown during demo shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long dark hair wearing a purple ribbed top; one woman wearing a grey sun hat and an off-the-shoulder dark blue top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Outdoor Costco parking lot, retail store shelves with bulk merchandise, a modern well-lit living room with neutral walls, and a white tiled bathroom with a bathtub.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voices greet the audience over an upbeat, rhythmic electronic BGM. A bright 'ding' sound effect emphasizes the Costco logo introduction. (2) Vocal delivery speeds up as they discuss pricing details, accompanied by cartoon-style 'boing' and transition whooshes. The BGM remains consistent and energetic. (3) Sound effects like 'sparkle' and 'pop' trigger as different attachments are displayed. The female narrator's voice remains clear with high pitch variability. (4) Splashing water sounds and the low hum of the mechanical motor of the device are audible during bathroom demonstration segments. (5) A sudden, loud male vocal stinger shouts about men being able to use it, followed by a playful 'wow' sound effect. (6) The video concludes with a rising musical stinger and a final enthusiastic thumbs-up vocalization from the two main speakers.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Limited Offer Intro -> Feature Breakdown -> Multi-scenario Demonstration -> User Result Comparison -> Final Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the limited-time discount of the Philips Wet & Dry Epilator at Costco. The video aims to convince female viewers (and men) of the device's versatility, ease of use, and effectiveness through practical demonstrations and pricing incentives.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct recommendation of the brand Philips and specific mention of the retailer Costco along with pricing and promotion dates.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical high-energy social media promotional video utilizing fast editing, bright colors, and enthusiastic hosts to market personal care technology.
